name: Life Drain
lore: The cord binds child to mother, a conduit for the fetus to drain an infinite future.

setEffects.descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: At turn end, gain Keyflare equal to 200% of the equipping character's Keyflare Regen. If the current Realm is {Caro}, the effect changes to increase {Embryo Fusion} by +1% for every 5 Keyflare Regen.
